name: Input
description: The Input primitive — the engine's first interactive effect. Where pure derivation (Fire All) mints triples with no outside dependency, Input pauses and asks the user. A Choice IS-A Input. A Choice points at its candidate Options via OF. When the user resolves a Choice, the engine records `Choice CHOSE option` and types that option as Chosen (Chosen IS-A Option). The engine's solicit scanner runs after every fire: any Choice that has Options (OF) but no resolution (no CHOSE) is surfaced in a modal asking the user to pick. Resolving a Choice re-fires to quiescence — so a pick can unlock downstream implications or expose further Choices, which solicit in turn. Comes with a seed: a single unresolved DoorChoice between LeftDoor and RightDoor — import it and Fire All to see the solicitation modal.
